title: Sequelize Transactions Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on database transaction management in Sequelize.

questions.question: Which ACID property ensures that either all operations in a transaction succeed or none do?
What is the recommended approach for handling transactions in Sequelize?
What method must be called to manually finalize an unmanaged transaction?
What happens if a callback within a managed transaction throws an error?
options: The transaction is automatically rolled back
The database fails and needs a restart

questions.question: Why would you need a transaction when transferring money between two accounts?
options: To ensure that money is not deducted from one without being added to the other
To logs the transfer in a separate database
